who: home appliance repair technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For home appliance repair technicians processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of work orders into digital invoices instead of manual invoicing using paper and spreadsheets.
problem: manual invoicing leads to errors and delays
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for repair technicians
Indie Hackers discussions on invoicing solutions
DM outreach to repair technicians with demo video
Share insights in community forums for technicians
try_it: Let users try simple work order input form and email delivery of invoices on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
